name_en: Top-tier Original, Changed Code Chip M83030 Black
name_cn:
Top-tier Original, Changed Code Chip M83030 Black
The Side Trunk bag is inspired by the brand's classic trunk, using quilted calfskin to shape a trunk-like silhouette, embellished with refined metal parts like reinforced corners and rivets, and creatively connecting an S-lock clasp for the zipper closure.
Full-grain calfskin trim
Small 18 x 12.5 x 8 cm
Medium 21 x 14 x 6 cm
(L x H x W)
Calfskin trim
